important: V4 corrects Target Residual Q2 in ReAssessmentItem; database import previously contains wrong target Q2 values.

III.E gas/kurs row is template/example; SPI states Tidak terjadi loss event.
I4.3 Rencana Perlakuan Risiko must be answer a.
